description: Winged bird-folk from the Elemental Plane of Air, soaring far above earthbound concerns.
subraces: Sharp-eyed mountain sentinels patrolling thermals and diving with talons bared.
Swift, aggressive hunters favoring hit-and-run strikes from dizzying heights.
Silent nocturnal scouts whose broad wings make no sound in the dark.
Vibrantly plumed traders and diplomats at home in tropical canopies and bustling ports.
